_comment: PLACEHOLDER COE checklist v2025.1. The 8 criteria from the design handoff are included verbatim; the rest are plausible ACFR review criteria. TODO: replace with the real ASBO COE checklist — PRD blocking dependency #1. Criteria are versioned by fiscal year (GASB 103 changes MD&A requirements from FY2026).

criteria.title: Report cover and title page identify the district and fiscal year
criteria.description: The cover/title page states the district's legal name, state, and the fiscal year covered, and labels the report an Annual Comprehensive Financial Report.

criteria.title: Letter of transmittal is present and signed
criteria.description: A letter of transmittal is included, signed by appropriate officials (e.g., Superintendent and Chief Financial Officer), and dated.

criteria.title: Table of contents covers all four report sections
criteria.description: A table of contents lists the introductory, financial, statistical, and (when applicable) compliance sections with page references.

criteria.title: Organizational chart and list of principal officials included
criteria.description: The introductory section presents an organizational chart and a list of elected/appointed officials.

criteria.title: Prior COE certificate reproduced when previously awarded
criteria.description: If the district received the Certificate of Excellence for the prior year, the certificate is reproduced in the introductory section.

criteria.title: Independent auditor's report expresses an unmodified (clean) opinion
criteria.description: The independent auditor's report is present and expresses an unmodified opinion on the basic financial statements.

criteria.title: Auditor's report identifies opinion units and audit standards
criteria.description: The auditor's report identifies the opinion units and states the audit was conducted in accordance with GAAS (and Government Auditing Standards where applicable).

criteria.title: MD&A is presented as required supplementary information
criteria.description: Management's Discussion and Analysis is presented before the basic financial statements as RSI.

criteria.title: MD&A includes condensed government-wide comparative data
criteria.description: MD&A presents condensed financial information derived from government-wide statements comparing the current and prior year.

criteria.title: MD&A analyzes overall financial position and results
criteria.description: MD&A discusses whether the district's overall financial position improved or deteriorated and explains significant changes.

criteria.title: MD&A is present and precedes the basic financial statements
criteria.description: MD&A appears in the correct location, immediately preceding the basic financial statements.

criteria.title: Government-wide statement of net position is presented
criteria.description: A statement of net position is presented for governmental and business-type activities using the economic resources measurement focus.

criteria.title: Government-wide statement of activities is presented
criteria.description: A statement of activities presents expenses by function with program revenues, showing net (expense) revenue.

criteria.title: Governmental funds balance sheet is presented with reconciliation
criteria.description: The governmental funds balance sheet is presented and reconciled to the government-wide statement of net position.

criteria.title: Statement of revenues, expenditures, and changes in fund balances with reconciliation
criteria.description: The governmental funds operating statement is presented and reconciled to the statement of activities.

criteria.title: Major funds are properly identified and presented
criteria.description: Major governmental and enterprise funds are identified per GASB 34 criteria and presented in separate columns.

criteria.title: Proprietary fund statements presented where applicable
criteria.description: If the district has proprietary funds, the required statements (net position, revenues/expenses, cash flows) are presented.

criteria.title: Fiduciary fund statements presented where applicable
criteria.description: If the district has fiduciary activities, statements of fiduciary net position and changes therein are presented.

criteria.title: Fund balance classifications follow GASB 54
criteria.description: Governmental fund balances are classified as nonspendable, restricted, committed, assigned, and unassigned.

criteria.title: Discretely presented component units reported per GASB 61
criteria.description: Component units are evaluated and, where required, discretely presented in accordance with GASB 61.

criteria.title: Summary of significant accounting policies is complete
criteria.description: The first note describes the reporting entity, basis of presentation, measurement focus, and significant policies.

criteria.title: Cash deposits and investments note discloses custodial risk
criteria.description: Notes disclose deposit and investment balances, credit risk, custodial credit risk, and interest-rate risk.

criteria.title: Interfund balances and transfers are disclosed and explained
criteria.description: Notes disclose interfund receivables/payables and transfers with purposes explained.

criteria.title: Long-term debt note rolls forward balances and shows maturities
criteria.description: Notes present changes in long-term liabilities and debt-service requirements to maturity.

criteria.title: OPEB disclosures comply with GASB 75
criteria.description: If the district provides OPEB, notes and RSI present the required GASB 75 disclosures.

criteria.title: Pension disclosures comply with GASB 68
criteria.description: Notes disclose the pension plan description, net pension liability, assumptions, and changes therein per GASB 68.

criteria.title: Pension note discloses the discount-rate sensitivity analysis (GASB 68)
criteria.description: The pension note presents the net pension liability calculated at the discount rate and at rates 1% higher and lower.

criteria.title: Commitments and contingencies are disclosed
criteria.description: Notes disclose significant commitments, litigation, and contingent liabilities.

criteria.title: Subsequent events are evaluated and disclosed
criteria.description: Notes disclose material subsequent events through the report issuance date.

criteria.title: Tax abatement disclosures comply with GASB 77 where applicable
criteria.description: If taxes are abated under agreements affecting the district, GASB 77 disclosures are presented.

criteria.title: Capital-asset note discloses depreciation methods and useful lives
criteria.description: The capital assets note discloses beginning/ending balances by class, depreciation methods, and estimated useful lives.

criteria.title: Budgetary comparison presented for the General Fund and major special revenue funds
criteria.description: Budgetary comparison schedules (or statements) present original budget, final budget, and actual amounts.

criteria.title: Budgetary comparison schedule for the General Fund is present
criteria.description: A budgetary comparison schedule for the General Fund is presented as RSI or a basic statement.

criteria.title: Budget-to-GAAP reconciliation presented where bases differ
criteria.description: If the budgetary basis differs from GAAP, a reconciliation is presented.

criteria.title: Statistical section presents financial trends information
criteria.description: Schedules present net position and changes in net position trend data.

criteria.title: Statistical section presents revenue capacity information
criteria.description: Schedules present assessed value, tax rates, principal taxpayers, and levies/collections.

criteria.title: Statistical section presents ten years of trend data
criteria.description: Required statistical schedules present ten fiscal years of data (or all years available for newer requirements, with explanation).

criteria.title: Statistical section presents debt capacity information
criteria.description: Schedules present ratios of outstanding debt, direct and overlapping debt, and legal debt margin.

criteria.title: Statistical section presents demographic and operating information
criteria.description: Schedules present demographic/economic indicators and operating data such as enrollment and staffing.

criteria.title: Single audit reports included when federal expenditures exceed the threshold
criteria.description: If required by Uniform Guidance, the compliance section includes the auditor's reports on internal control and compliance and the SEFA.

criteria.title: Schedule of findings and questioned costs is presented
criteria.description: When a single audit is required, the schedule of findings and questioned costs (and corrective action plans, if findings exist) is presented.
